EDUCATION.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
EDUCATION.description: Daffodil Institute of IT (DIIT) became affiliated to the National University for conducting the BSc (Professional) in Computer Science and BBA programs.
Patuakhali Government College is a educational institution in Patuakhali district of Barisal division.

Creative IT is an institution where empowering the community with an excellent standard of learning is what they desire. They endeavour for the continuous improvement of their leaders who will work to construct a better future.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained ERP applications focused on Accounting and Human Resource Management (HRM) modules, including financial workflows, reporting, payroll, and employee management.
Customized enterprise software solutions to meet client-specific business requirements and improve operational efficiency.
Played a key role in the development and maintenance of the YKK GA & Legal System.
Developed and supported attendance device integration solutions to streamline attendance management and reduce manual processing.
Delivered ongoing enhancements, bug fixes, and technical support for existing applications, ensuring system stability and continuous improvement.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams throughout the software development lifecycle, from requirements analysis to deployment and support.
Developed and maintained web applications using Laravel and PHP, delivering scalable and user-focused solutions.
Built interactive and responsive user interfaces using JavaScript, React.js, AJAX, HTML, and CSS.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams throughout the software development lifecycle, from requirements gathering to deployment.
Designed, optimized, and maintained MySQL databases to ensure data integrity and application performance.
Performed application maintenance, bug fixing, feature enhancements, and performance optimization.
Utilized Git for version control, code management, and effective team collaboration.
Provided technical support for ISP infrastructure, routers, and switches to end-users based on requirements.
Coordinated with the network operation team to ensure smooth rollout plans and service delivery.

BIO.short_bio: Dedicated software engineer based in Dhaka, creating dynamic and user-friendly applications that drive innovation.
BIO.long_bio: I'm Md. Al Amin, a software engineer at Ambala IT. I specialize in Laravel, JavaScript, and MySQL, delivering efficient and user-focused web applications.
BIO.description:
👋 Hi, I'm Md. Al Amin, a passionate Software Engineer at Ambala IT, dedicated to building seamless and user-friendly web applications.

💻 Back-end Expertise: Specializing in PHP and Laravel to develop robust and scalable applications.

🎨 Front-end Skills: Proficient in JavaScript and Vue.js, creating interactive and dynamic user interfaces.

🚀 Modern Tools: Experienced with Inertia.js and Vite for efficient and high-performance development.

🗃️ Database Management: Skilled in MySQL, ensuring data integrity and optimal performance.

⚡ Dynamic Web Development: Mastering AJAX for responsive and real-time user experiences.
BIO.career_summary:
🎓 I graduated with a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering from Daffodil Institute of IT in 2022. Since then, I have worked across multiple roles, currently as a Software Engineer at Ambala IT, where I specialize in back-end and front-end development using PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, and MySQL.

💼 Previously, I worked as a Full-Stack Web Developer at Nano Information Technology (Nanosoft) and as a Support Engineer at One Sky Communications Limited, gaining extensive experience in both web development and technical support. 🌱
BIO.projects:
📌 These are some of the key projects I have worked on:

💼 ERP Application: A comprehensive business management solution integrating finance, HR, and operations.

🚀 BRAC SELP: A platform for social empowerment and legal protection.

📦 SB Inventory: A solution for tracking stock, sales, and business analytics.
